api_key.description: Engram API key (eng_live_... or test key). If left blank, the ENGRAM_API_KEY environment variable is used.
api_key.hint: Create one at https://lumetra.io/app/api-keys. Stored in AstrBot's plugin config under data/config/.

base_url.description: Engram API base URL. Use the default unless you are self-hosting.

default_bucket.description: Bucket name used when a message has no obvious per-user or per-chat bucket.
default_bucket.hint: Buckets are created lazily on first write.

bucket_strategy.description: How to derive a bucket name for /remember, /recall, and auto-archive.
bucket_strategy.hint: per_user = one bucket per sender id; per_chat = one bucket per group/session; fixed = always use default_bucket.

bucket_prefix.description: Optional prefix prepended to every bucket name (useful when sharing one Engram tenant across bots).
bucket_prefix.hint: Final bucket = {bucket_prefix}-{user_or_chat_id} (or just bucket_prefix if strategy=fixed).

auto_archive.description: If true, every incoming chat message is stored to Engram in the background. Off by default.
auto_archive.hint: Adds one Engram store call per message. Respects bucket_strategy.

auto_archive_min_length.description: Skip auto-archive for messages shorter than this many characters.

timeout_seconds.description: HTTP timeout for Engram API calls.
